languages.text: {n}Вольный Торговец распрямляет плечи и обращается к присутствующим:{/n} "Враг подобрался к воротам дворца, и пришло время дать отпор".
{n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."
languages.original_text: {n}Вольный Торговец распрямляет плечи и обращается к присутствующим:{/n} "Враг подобрался к воротам дворца, и пришло время дать отпор".

{n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."

languages.text: {n}行商浪人挺直身躯，对众人宣布：{/n}“敌人已经逼近宫殿大门，是时候反击了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."

traits.locale_text: {n}行商浪人挺直身躯，对众人宣布：{/n}“敌人已经逼近宫殿大门，是时候反击了。”

languages.text: {n}Le libre-marchand redresse les épaules et s'adresse à l'assemblée :{/n} « L'ennemi est aux portes du palais, et l'heure est venue de riposter. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le libre-marchand redresse les épaules et s'adresse à l'assemblée :{/n} « L'ennemi est aux portes du palais, et l'heure est venue de riposter. »

languages.text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente se endereza y se dirige a los presentes:{/n} «El enemigo se acerca a las puertas del palacio. Es hora de contraatacar».
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente se endereza y se dirige a los presentes:{/n} «El enemigo se acerca a las puertas del palacio. Es hora de contraatacar».

languages.text: {n}Hür Tacir, omuzlarını dikleştirip meclise hitap ediyor.{/n} "Düşman, saray kapılarına dayandı. Karşılık verme zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."

languages.text: {n}Der Freihändler strafft seine Schultern und richtet das Wort an die Anwesenden:{/n} "Der Feind steht vor den Toren des Palastes und es wird Zeit, zurückzuschlagen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."

languages.text: {n}ローグトレーダーは肩を正して集会に語りかける:{/n}「敵は宮門に迫り、反撃の時が来た」
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader squares his shoulders and addresses the assembly:{/n} "The enemy has drawn close to the palace gates, and it is time to fight back."
